name: Hawaiian Pineapple Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt; stir in pecans.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients; mix well.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture, stirring just until the dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Spoon the batter into two greased and floured 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 inch loaf pans.
6. Bake for about 1 hour and 30 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pans for 10 minutes; remove from the pans and let cool on wire racks.
